Galway United: Brendan Clarke; Killian Brouder, Bobby Burns (Regan Donelon, 70), Greg Cunningham, Jeannot Esua, Robert Slevin;Patrick Hickey, David Hurley (Vincent Borden, 81), Jimmy Keohane; Moses Dyer (Cian Byrne, 70), Stephen Walsh (Max Wilson, 91).
